title: Digital Marketing Fundamentals & Market Research
description:
Objective

Understand foundational digital marketing concepts, perform comprehensive market and competitor analysis, and establish target audience personas.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Introduction to Digital Marketing & Funnels
  • Audience Persona Creation & Competitor Research
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Customer journey mapping and touchpoints
  • SWOT analysis and market positioning strategies
Learning Resources:
  • Google Digital Garage – https://learndigital.withgoogle.com/digitalgarage

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Strategy & Persona Blueprint

Develop a comprehensive customer persona profile and analyze three primary competitors using digital intelligence tools.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Audience persona and competitor analysis report PDF.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Gain the ability to structure digital marketing funnels and identify core customer segments for targeted brand campaigns.

title: Search Engine Optimization (SEO) & Content Strategy
description:
Objective

Master on-page, off-page, and technical SEO principles alongside building high-converting content marketing strategies.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Keyword Research & On-Page SEO
  • Content Planning & Content Marketing
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Search intent, meta tags, and URL structuring
  • Content calendar development and copywriting frameworks
Learning Resources:
  • Moz SEO Learning Center – https://moz.com/learn/seo

Practical Implementation

Project Task: SEO Audit & Content Plan

Perform keyword research for a sample niche and draft a 4-week optimized content calendar with targeted metadata.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Keyword research spreadsheet and monthly content strategy document.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Understand how to optimize web pages for search engines and draft scalable content assets that drive organic traffic.

title: Technical SEO & Website Optimization
description:
Objective

Dive deep into site architecture, crawling, indexing, page speed optimization, and off-page link building strategies.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Technical SEO & Core Web Vitals
  • Off-Page SEO & Link Building Tactics
2. Detailed Concepts
  • XML sitemaps, robots.txt, and site speed audits
  • Backlink acquisition, guest posting, and outreach strategies
Learning Resources:
  • Google Search Central – https://developers.google.com/search

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Technical Audit & Backlink Strategy

Execute a simulated site speed and structural audit, identifying fixes alongside a backlink outreach campaign outline.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Technical SEO audit report and backlink outreach tracking sheet.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Gain technical proficiency in resolving site errors and designing high-authority link acquisition campaigns.

title: Social Media Marketing & Brand Management
description:
Objective

Learn organic social media management, platform-specific content curation, and community engagement frameworks.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Organic Social Media Growth (Instagram, LinkedIn, X, TikTok)
  • Social Listening & Community Management
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Algorithm nuances, posting cadences, and hashtag strategies
  • Brand voice alignment and crisis management protocols
Learning Resources:
  • Hootsuite Academy – https://education.hootsuite.com/

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Social Media Playbook

Design a 30-day multi-platform social media calendar complete with graphical asset placeholders and caption copy.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Social media calendar spreadsheet and content asset preview folder.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Master community growth dynamics and creative content structuring to build engaged brand audiences online.

title: Paid Advertising: Meta Ads & Campaign Scaling
description:
Objective

Set up, execute, and optimize paid acquisition campaigns utilizing Meta Ads Manager with advanced audience targeting.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Meta Ads Architecture & Pixel Setup
  • Budgeting, Bidding & A/B Testing
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Custom audiences, lookalike audiences, and tracking setup
  • Creative testing, CPA, and ROAS optimization metrics
Learning Resources:
  • Meta Blueprint – https://www.facebook.com/business/learn

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Paid Campaign Architecture

Build a structured media buying proposal outlining campaign objectives, ad variations, targeting criteria, and budget distribution.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Media buying plan presentation and ad creative mockups document.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Develop hands-on expertise in deploying scalable paid ads pipelines and managing performance-driven budgets.

title: Search Engine Marketing (SEM) & Google Ads
description:
Objective

Master paid search engine marketing using Google Ads, including search network campaigns, bidding strategies, and quality score improvements.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Google Search Campaign Structure
  • Keyword Match Types & Quality Score Optimization
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Ad extensions, negative keywords, and landing page relevance
  • CPC, CPA, and conversion tracking implementations
Learning Resources:
  • Google Skillshop – https://skillshop.exceedlms.com/

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Google Ads Setup Plan

Design a Google Search campaign layout complete with keyword lists, negative keyword parameters, and responsive ad text.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Google Ads structural proposal and ad copy framework report.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Acquire tactical execution skills to capture high-intent search traffic through performance-based search engine marketing.

title: Email Marketing Automation & Lifecycle Campaigns
description:
Objective

Build automated email marketing flows, newsletters, and customer retention segmentation workflows.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Email List Segmentation & Subscriber Growth
  • Automation Drip Sequences & Copywriting
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Welcome flows, cart abandonment sequences, and re-engagement campaigns
  • Open rates, click-through rates (CTR), and deliverability best practices
Learning Resources:
  • Mailchimp Academy – https://mailchimp.com/resources/

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Email Sequence Blueprint

Write a 5-part automated email welcome and conversion sequence tailored to a specific product or service funnel.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Email copywriting templates and workflow schema diagram.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Master direct-response copywriting and lifecycle automation techniques to nurture leads and increase customer retention.

title: Web Analytics, Reporting & Capstone Campaign
description:
Objective

Analyze multi-channel digital marketing performance using Google Analytics (GA4) and compile a complete capstone campaign strategy report.

Learning Phase

1. Main Topics
  • Google Analytics (GA4) & Conversion Tracking
  • Omnichannel Campaign Strategy & Reporting
2. Detailed Concepts
  • Attribution models, event tracking, and KPI dashboards
  • Data-driven decision making and performance optimization summaries
Learning Resources:
  • Google Analytics Help – https://support.google.com/analytics/

Practical Implementation

Project Task: Comprehensive Capstone Strategy Presentation

Synthesize all prior learnings into an end-to-end digital marketing capstone report featuring SEO, social, paid, and analytical dashboards.

Deliverables

  • Google Drive Shared Folder Link containing Design Assets / Case Study Files / PDF Presentation (MANDATORY / MUST - Ensure permissions are set to 'Anyone with the link can view')
  • Complete capstone campaign presentation deck and analytics report summary.
  • Detailed README explaining setup commands.

Learning Outcomes

Successfully master omnichannel performance tracking and present a professional-grade strategic digital marketing portfolio.
